subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath made the world a manifest Book and a mighty scroll, and hath inscribed therein that which doth govern [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی جعل الدنیا کتابا مبینا و دفترا متینا و رقم فیه ما یحکم علی
subcodes.subjects: @law of transformation and change, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
